name: Kelly 32 leather handbag
description:
A true icon of timeless luxury, this Hermès Kelly 32 is crafted in classic black Box Calf leather with rich gold hardware. Elegant, structured, and endlessly sophisticated, this piece embodies the refined craftsmanship Hermès is known for.
The Box Calf leather offers a smooth, glossy finish that develops a beautiful patina over time, enhancing its vintage character. The structured silhouette of the 32cm size makes it ideal for both day and travel use, fitting essentials comfortably while maintaining a polished profile.
Signature details include the front flap with sangles and turn-lock closure, clochette with lock and keys. 
Stamped from 1989, this piece represents the highly collectible era of late 80s Hermès craftsmanship, prized for its quality and durability.

SKU0051000
